commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh For I the LORD love justice, I hate robbery with a burnt offering; and I will direct their work in truth, and I will make an everlasting covenant with them. The pagans saw such things were improper victims. (Eusebius, præp. ) Septuagint, "hate unjust plunder. "(Haydock) Therefore will I subject the strangers to you, ver. I will grant a sure reward. These of Nehemias and the Machabees were soon forgotten: but Christ's covenant shall abide for ever.
